scripts.install:all: npm install && cd next-front && npm install && cd ../nest-api && npm install
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint --prefix next-front && npm run lint --prefix nest-api
scripts.format:all: npm run format --prefix next-front && npm run format --prefix nest-api
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck --prefix next-front && npm run typecheck --prefix nest-api
